title: FrozenAFKzone
description: The best lightweight papermc AFK zone plugin
body:
# ❄️ FrozenAFKZone

**FrozenAFKZone is a lightweight and highly customizable Minecraft plugin designed to manage AFK (Away From Keyboard) players efficiently on your server. Built with performance and flexibility in mind, it provides a seamless AFK experience with modern features and clean system design.**

# 🛠️ Configuration

**FrozenAFKZone comes with an easy-to-use configuration file where you can:**

1. Set AFK time delay

2. Customize messages, rewards and sounds

3. Configurable AFK world

# 📦 Compatibility

**✅ Supports Minecraft versions 1.16 → 1.21+**
**✅ Works with Paper, Spigot, and forks**

# 📌 Support

**If you find any bugs or need help, feel free to reach out or open an issue.**
